news.headline: India denounces ‘hellhole’ remark shared by Trump
news.summary: India’s Foreign Ministry says comments by US radio host Michael Savage, circulated by Trump, are 'uninformed'.

news.headline: Global hunger report warns of rising malnutrition and famine risks
news.summary: Conflict remains the leading driver of hunger, affecting nearly 150 million people facing acute food shortages.
